quicksight.dashboard.axislabeloptions.Cf: The label options for a chart axis. You must specify the field that the label is targeted to.

quicksight.dashboard.axislabeloptions.Ap.Description: The options that indicate which field the label belongs to.

quicksight.dashboard.axislabeloptions.Cu.Description: The text for the axis label.

quicksight.dashboard.axislabeloptions.Fo.Description: The font configuration of the axis label.
